title: Rispwind's Obsidian Expansion
description: Gives Netherite a new use while also adding Obsidian Tools.
body:
A small mod that adds Obsidian Ingots, which can be crafted using 4 Netherite Scraps and 1 block of Obsidian. These ingots can be used to craft new lategame tools.
You could also call this an "Obsidian Tools" mod.
